sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Infosys Begins Next CEO Hunt 'Quietly': Who’s Next Still Remain Unanswered
feed.summary: Infosys has quietly begun searching for its next CEO as current chief Salil Parekh's term ends in March 2027. The board is expected to grant Parekh a two-year extension to manage a smooth succession, rather than a full five-year term due to the company's normal retirement age of 60. This measured approach aims to avoid the leadership turbulence seen in previous transitions, with internal and external candidates being evaluated to ensure stability.

feed.title: Evergreen Capital Management LLC Raises Stock Position in Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Evergreen Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 64.6% in Q4, acquiring an additional 3,056 shares, bringing its total to 7,787 shares valued at $4.461 million. This move comes as institutional investors now hold about 70.98% of Caterpillar's stock, despite the company's valuation concerns and recent insider selling activity. Caterpillar recently beat Q4 earnings estimates with EPS of $5.16 and revenue of $19.13 billion, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share.

feed.title: Evergreen Capital Management LLC Buys 26,394 Shares of Wells Fargo & Company $WFC
feed.summary: Evergreen Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Wells Fargo & Company by 77.6% in the fourth quarter, adding 26,394 shares to hold a total of 60,391 shares valued at approximately $5.63 million. This move comes despite recent insider sales and analysts' varied ratings for Wells Fargo, which reported Q1 EPS of $1.60 and revenue of $21.45 billion. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $1.80 and a yield of 2.2%.

feed.title: Evergreen Capital Management LLC Buys 9,076 Shares of The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Evergreen Capital Management LLC increased its stake in The TJX Companies by 51.4% during Q4, acquiring 9,076 additional shares, bringing its total holdings to 26,725 shares valued at approximately $4.11 million. This move aligns with a generally positive analyst outlook, with many analysts issuing "Buy" ratings and raising price targets for TJX. The company recently reported an earnings beat and increased its quarterly dividend and FY2027 guidance.

feed.title: Casino news | MGM Northfield Park sale completes
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has completed the sale of MGM Northfield Park's operations to private equity funds managed by Clairvest Group for $546 million in cash. VICI Properties concurrently entered into a new triple-net lease with Clairvest for the real property and amended its master lease with MGM. This divestment of a non-strategic regional asset allows MGM to deploy proceeds towards strengthening its balance sheet, investing in growth, and returning capital to shareholders.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Set to Report Earnings. It’s Turning the Cash Flow Back On.
feed.summary: Texas Instruments, a leading analog chip maker, is approaching its first-quarter earnings report amidst a period of transition. The company anticipates significantly reduced capital expenditure in 2026 following elevated spending over the past three years. This shift suggests a renewed focus on cash flow as it navigates its current business changes.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH Shares Purchased by Cwm LLC
feed.summary: Cwm LLC notably increased its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation (PH) by 24.5% in Q4, acquiring 1,217 additional shares to reach a total of 6,190 shares valued at $5.44 million. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS estimates and showing a 9.1% revenue increase year-over-year. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $1,000.60, despite recent insider share sales.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Announces CE Mark Approval for the New ETHICON™ 4000 Stapler
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson has received European CE Mark approval for its new ETHICON™ 4000 Stapler, an advanced surgical stapler designed for reliable staple line integrity across various tissue thicknesses. This device features proprietary 3D Stapling Technology and enhanced Gripping Surface Technology, certified for use in open and laparoscopic surgeries in the EU. The technology is also planned for future integration with the OTTAVA™ Robotic Surgical System, aiming to reduce surgical complications like leaks and bleeding.

feed.title: Cwm LLC Buys 52,934 Shares of HP Inc. $HPQ
feed.summary: Cwm LLC recently increased its stake in HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) by 34%, purchasing an additional 52,934 shares to bring its total holdings to 208,634 shares, valued at approximately $4.65 million. The computer maker reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with $0.81 EPS and $14.44 billion in revenue. Despite a mixed analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and a target price of $21.58, HP offers a substantial quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, yielding 5.7% annually.

feed.title: TSCO Stock: Analysts Turn Cautious On Tractor Supply After Weak Q1 Print, But Retail Says ‘Oversold’
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co. (TSCO) saw its stock drop significantly after a weak Q1 earnings report, missing revenue and EPS estimates. Analysts from Jefferies and Truist lowered price targets, with Jefferies maintaining a 'Buy' rating due to long-term optimism and Truist issuing a 'Hold' due to competitive pressures and a decline in the companion animal segment. Despite analyst caution, retail traders show increased bullish sentiment, considering the stock 'oversold' after a more than 20% year-to-date decline.

feed.title: Infosys Q4 in focus post TCS, Wipro, HCLTech - Results, dividend announcement date and time | Preview
feed.summary: Infosys is set to announce its Q4 FY26 earnings and potentially a final dividend on April 23. Analysts at Motilal Oswal and PL Capital project a slight sequential decline in constant currency revenue for Q4, but PL Capital expects strong deal wins and a FY27 revenue growth guidance of 4-6%. Axis Direct, however, anticipates a 3.2% sequential revenue growth driven by deal ramp-ups and cross-currency tailwinds, alongside improved EBIT margins.

feed.title: OpenAI goes to TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Accenture and other big global consulting companies for enterprise adoption of its Codex AI tools
feed.summary: OpenAI is expanding its partnerships with leading global consulting and IT services companies like Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, Infosys, PwC, and TCS to accelerate the enterprise adoption of its Codex AI tools. The company is also launching Codex Labs, an initiative to embed its specialists within customer organizations to assist with implementation. This move comes amid increasing competition in the AI market and reflects OpenAI's focus on integrating its AI tools into existing enterprise workflows.

feed.title: UBS upgrades Biogen stock rating on pipeline catalysts, raises target to $225
feed.summary: UBS has upgraded Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) from Neutral to Buy and increased its price target to $225 from $185, citing increasing conviction on multiple pipeline catalysts expected over the next 12 to 15 months. Key catalysts include BIIB080 tau data, Phase III litifilimab data in systemic lupus erythematosus, and Phase III antibody-mediated rejection data for felzartamab. The stock has seen a 56% return over the past year, and InvestingPro analysis suggests it remains undervalued with a Fair Value of $252.

feed.title: Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST Shares Sold by Boston Trust Walden Corp
feed.summary: Boston Trust Walden Corp reduced its holdings in Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) by 3.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 20,227 shares. Despite this, the stock remains a significant part of their portfolio, valued at $99.27 million. The article also notes recent insider selling by COO Michael J. Hartshorn and CMO Karen Sykes, alongside several analyst upgrades and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for Ross Stores.

feed.title: Boston Trust Walden Corp Reduces Position in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Boston Trust Walden Corp decreased its stake in Cisco Systems by 2.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 31,167 shares and holding 1,324,942 shares valued at $102 million. Other institutional investors made various changes to their positions, while company insiders, including SVP Maria Victoria Wong and CEO Charles Robbins, sold significant amounts of stock. Cisco Systems recently increased its quarterly dividend and analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK Shares Sold by Boston Trust Walden Corp
feed.summary: Boston Trust Walden Corp reduced its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. by 3.0% in Q4, selling 14,563 shares, now holding 465,618 shares valued at approximately $49.01 million. This comes as Merck's shares dropped 3.8% following the failure of a late-stage oncology combination therapy to meet primary endpoints, though the company exceeded quarterly EPS expectations and received several regulatory approvals. Despite the clinical setback, Merck issued positive FY2026 earnings guidance and maintains a 3.0% dividend yield.

feed.title: Boston Trust Walden Corp Sells 817 Shares of Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. $MTD

Mettler-Toledo International beat its earnings per share and revenue estimates in its latest quarterly report and currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: Boston Trust Walden Corp Sells 4,831 Shares of Jones Lang LaSalle Incorporated $JLL

feed.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL Shares Acquired by BXM Wealth LLC

feed.title: Teradyne, Inc. $TER Stock Holdings Lessened by Boston Trust Walden Corp
feed.summary: Boston Trust Walden Corp reduced its stake in Teradyne, Inc. by 26.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 159,529 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors like ARK Investment Management and Assenagon Asset Management S.A. increased their holdings. Teradyne recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its dividend, while also acquiring TestInsight to boost its AI and data center testing exposure.

feed.title: Boston Trust Walden Corp Has $67.66 Million Stake in Sysco Corporation $SYY

Sysco reported Q4 EPS of $0.99 and revenue of $20.76 billion, while increasing its quarterly dividend to $0.55. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $87.85.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. $ZBH Shares Sold by Boston Trust Walden Corp
feed.summary: Boston Trust Walden Corp reduced its stake in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. by 3.5% in the fourth quarter. Various other institutional investors have either increased or initiated positions in the medical equipment provider.

feed.title: South America Next Generation Sequencing eDNA Biomonitoring Market is Going to Boom | Major Giants Thermo Fisher Scientific, Illumina Inc., QIAGEN N.V.
authors: HTF Market Intelligence Consulting Pvt Ltd
feed.summary: The South America Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) eDNA Biomonitoring market is projected to reach USD 550.2 Million by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 15.6% from USD 150.5 Million in 2025. This growth is driven by increasing environmental awareness, government conservation initiatives, and advancements in sequencing technologies. Key players in this expanding market include Thermo Fisher Scientific, Illumina Inc., and QIAGEN N.V.

feed.title: Form 485APOS - Innovator ETFs Trust
feed.summary: This document is a Form 485APOS filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission for Innovator ETFs Trust, specifically concerning the Innovator Technology Managed Floor ETF. It outlines the fund's investment objective, strategies, fees, and associated risks, including its approach to capital appreciation while limiting losses through a combination of equity investments and options contracts. The filing details the fund's operational structure, management, and tax information, indicating that the fund has not yet commenced operations as of the document's May 20, 2022, preliminary date.

feed.title: Sony, Honda scale back EV venture after Afeela halt
feed.summary: Sony Group, Honda Motor, and their joint venture Sony Honda Mobility have announced a significant scaling back of their EV operations, following the recent cancellation of plans for their Afeela electric vehicles. Employees are expected to be reassigned to the parent companies, as the firms concluded that bringing products aligned with the JV's original purpose to market within the short to medium term would be difficult under the current framework. Despite this, they remain committed to delivering value through software in the user experience.

feed.title: Belpointe Asset Management LLC Has $1.61 Million Stock Position in Darden Restaurants, Inc. $DRI
feed.summary: Belpointe Asset Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Darden Restaurants (DRI) by 193.3% in Q4, holding 8,771 shares valued at approximately $1.61 million. Darden Restaurants has also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share, leading to an annualized dividend of $6.00 and a yield of approximately 3.0%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $226.24.

feed.title: From chip to chiller: Ecolab’s future for data centres lies in integrated cooling
feed.summary: Ecolab is advocating for an integrated cooling platform in data centers, moving away from siloed systems to optimize longevity and material compatibility. Rob Lowe, director of research, development and engineering for Ecolab’s global high tech division, emphasizes a "cooling-as-a-service" approach that spans from the chip to the chiller, integrating coolant health monitoring and mechanical touch points for system-wide efficiency. This strategy aims to address the challenges posed by rapidly evolving AI technologies and rising power demands in the data center industry.

feed.title: Boston Trust Walden Corp Sells 2,771 Shares of Deere & Company $DE
feed.summary: Boston Trust Walden Corp reduced its stake in Deere & Company by 1.7%, selling 2,771 shares in Q4 and now owning 162,824 shares valued at $75.8 million. Deere & Company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $2.42 and revenue of $9.61 billion, a 17.5% year-over-year increase. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.62 per share, and the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating.

feed.title: AI buildout drives global tech spending to $6.31 trillion in 2026
feed.summary: Gartner forecasts worldwide IT spending to reach $6.31 trillion in 2026, a 13.5% increase from 2025, primarily driven by accelerated investment in AI infrastructure and advanced memory. Data center systems spending is projected to see the largest growth at 55.8%, with IT services leading overall spending. This growth highlights a multi-speed IT market, where AI-centric segments significantly outperform traditional categories, creating meaningful opportunities for companies in AI-optimized technologies despite rising memory costs impacting device growth.

feed.title: Why Is NetApp (NTAP) Stock Trending Overnight
feed.summary: NetApp (NTAP) shares are trending after the company received its seventh Google Cloud Infrastructure Modernization Partner of the Year for Storage Award. This recognition highlights NetApp's expanded partnership with Google Cloud, particularly with advancements in Google Cloud NetApp Volumes for block storage and tighter integration with other Google Cloud services. Despite a recent downgrade by JP Morgan, NetApp's stock has seen positive price action and strong year-over-year gains.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH Shares Sold by Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd
feed.summary: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd reduced its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation by 2.9% in Q4, selling 16,149 shares and now holding 545,796 shares valued at $479.7 million. Despite this, Parker-Hannifin remains Alphinity's 8th largest holding, and Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $1,000.60. Recent insider transactions show executives selling shares, though institutional investors still own a significant 82.44% of the company's stock.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corporation $ON Shares Sold by Asset Management One Co. Ltd.
feed.summary: Asset Management One Co. Ltd. reduced its stake in ON Semiconductor Corporation by 13.7% in Q4, selling 27,405 shares. Despite insider selling totaling $8.49 million, the stock trades near its 52-week high, buoyed by AI/datacenter demand projections and a recent EPS beat. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating with an average $64.96 target.

($OMC) by 40.4% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total to 112,771 shares valued at approximately $9.08 million. This comes despite Omnicom missing its quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. The company's board has also authorized a $5.0 billion stock buyback and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.80, signaling a commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: Asset Management One Co. Ltd. Sells 19,047 Shares of Las Vegas Sands Corp. $LVS
feed.summary: Asset Management One Co. Ltd. reduced its stake in Las Vegas Sands Corp. by 12.8% in Q4 2025, selling 19,047 shares and retaining 129,280 shares valued at $8.485 million. This institutional sell-off follows CEO Patrick Dumont's sale of 60,165 shares in March, decreasing his position by over 10%. Despite insider selling and trimmed price targets from analysts, LVS maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating, having beaten Q4 earnings expectations and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Asset Management One Co. Ltd. Has $10.03 Million Stake in Fortive Corporation $FTV
feed.summary: Asset Management One Co. Ltd. has significantly increased its stake in Fortive Corporation, now owning 178,605 shares valued at approximately $10.03 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in Fortive, which recently reported strong Q4 results, surpassing earnings and revenue estimates. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $60, Fortive maintains a quarterly dividend and has a market capitalization of $18.79 billion.

feed.title: Accretive Wealth Partners LLC Makes New $1.34 Million Investment in Tyler Technologies, Inc. $TYL
feed.summary: Accretive Wealth Partners LLC has initiated a new position in Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL), acquiring 2,945 shares valued at approximately $1.34 million in the fourth quarter. Despite this new investment and strong institutional ownership, Tyler Technologies missed Q4 earnings and revenue estimates, and insiders were net sellers during the last quarter. Analysts currently maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock, with an average target price of $463.69, although several firms have recently lowered their price targets.

feed.title: Chubb crushes Q1 forecasts as catastrophe losses plunge
feed.summary: Chubb Limited exceeded Q1 financial forecasts with net income of $2.32 billion and core operating income of $2.69 billion, largely attributed to a significant drop in catastrophe losses. Despite the strong performance, CEO Evan Greenberg warned of softening pricing in property and financial lines, prompting Chubb to adjust its strategy, including buying more reinsurance and making workforce reductions outlined in a prior communication. The company's results mirrored trends seen in its peer Travelers, indicating broader market shifts.

feed.title: Pfizer Oncology Pivot In Focus As ASCO 2026 Data And PADCEV Loom
feed.summary: Pfizer is set to unveil significant oncology pipeline updates at the ASCO 2026 Annual Meeting, showcasing new clinical data for several marketed and pipeline cancer therapies. This strategic shift aims to reposition Pfizer towards oncology, moving away from its previous focus on COVID-related products. The company also has a near-term regulatory catalyst with the Priority Review for PADCEV plus Keytruda in muscle invasive bladder cancer, reinforcing cancer care as central to Pfizer's future story despite ongoing earnings challenges and capital constraints highlighted by analysts.

feed.title: IHG signs Holiday Inn Sriperumbudur in the State of Tamil Nadu
feed.summary: IHG Hotels & Resorts has signed a management agreement to develop Holiday Inn Sriperumbudur in Tamil Nadu, India, in partnership with Thanishq Grande Hotels & Resorts. Scheduled to open in Q1 2029, the 200-key hotel will cater to corporate, spiritual, and transit demand in Sriperumbudur, a rapidly growing industrial and commercial hub. This development aims to strengthen IHG's presence in the region and leverage the area's strategic location and economic growth.

feed.title: 25,856 Shares in Howmet Aerospace Inc. $HWM Bought by Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd
feed.summary: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd recently acquired 25,856 shares of Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) during the fourth quarter, totaling approximately $5.30 million. This comes as Howmet Aerospace exceeded Q4 earnings and revenue estimates and raised its guidance for Q1 and FY 2026. Despite insider selling by an EVP, institutional investors hold a significant majority of the company's stock, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" rating and a consensus price target of $266.89.

feed.title: Assetmark Inc. Grows Stock Holdings in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Assetmark Inc. increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 15.7% during the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 69,735 shares to bring its total holdings to 512,595 shares valued at approximately $160.85 million. This increase comes as Alphabet reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $2.82 and revenue of $113.83 billion, an 18% increase year-over-year. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a "Buy" rating and an average target price of $346.03 for the stock, which currently trades with a market cap near $4.0 trillion.

feed.title: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd Cuts Stake in O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. $ORLY
feed.summary: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd reduced its stake in O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. by 11.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 478,047 shares and now holding 3,562,580 shares valued at approximately $325 million. This makes O'Reilly Automotive its 18th largest holding. Despite this cut, other institutional investors significantly increased their positions, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $110.26.

feed.title: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd Makes New $252.20 Million Investment in Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd has made a significant new investment in Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT), acquiring 440,246 shares valued at $252.20 million. This positions Caterpillar as the 24th largest holding in Alphinity's portfolio, despite the stock trading near its one-year high with a high P/E ratio. The investment follows strong Q4 earnings for Caterpillar and is driven by positive sentiment around growth catalysts like analyst upgrades, an autonomy acquisition, and a telematics partnership related to data-center and energy demand.

feed.title: Janus Henderson ICAV - Net Asset Value(s)
feed.summary: This article provides the Net Asset Values (NAV) for various share classes of the Janus Henderson ICAV funds, specifically focusing on their EUR AAA CLO and USD AAA CLO UCITS ETFs. The data includes valuation dates, ISIN codes, shares in issue, currency, total net asset value, and NAV per share for each fund as of April 21, 2026.

feed.title: Segantii Pre-Trial Reveals Ex-BofA Trader Gave Key Information
feed.summary: A pre-trial hearing in Hong Kong revealed that a former Bank of America Merrill Lynch trader, Tony Psarianos, provided crucial information to Segantii Capital Management before a June 2017 block trade. Psarianos informed Segantii trader Daniel La Rocca about the size and seller of 195 million Esprit Holdings Ltd. shares, allowing the hedge fund to anticipate and position itself ahead of the transaction. This disclosure comes from background information in a recent court judgment.

feed.title: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) Receives Consensus Rating of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $188.30. Despite a high valuation with a P/E of 76.5, the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.19 per share. Insider activity shows sales by CEO Andrew Wilson and EVP Laura Miele under pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plans.

feed.title: Chevron Corporation (CVX): Among the Best Crude Oil Stocks to Buy According to Analysts
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation (CVX) has been listed among the best crude oil stocks to buy according to analysts, following an upgrade to Outperform by BNP Paribas with a $174 price target. The upgrade is driven by expectations of an extended upside cycle in crude prices due to geopolitical tensions and limited non-OPEC supply growth. Additionally, Chevron recently won a significant legal victory at the U.S. Supreme Court concerning Louisiana coastal erosion claims, further reducing uncertainty for investors.

feed.title: Golden Star Announces Cancellation of Business Combination Extraordinary General Meeting
feed.summary: Golden Star Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: GODN) has cancelled its extraordinary general meeting scheduled for May 30, 2024, which was to vote on a business combination with Gamehaus Inc. Gamehaus received a notice from the China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) requiring it to complete a filing, which is a condition for the business combination's consummation. The meeting was cancelled to allow more time for closing conditions to be met.

feed.title: InterContinental Hotels Group Cancels 20,000 Shares After Latest Buyback
feed.summary: InterContinental Hotels Group (IHG) has repurchased and will cancel 20,000 ordinary shares for approximately $145.64 per share. This buyback, part of an ongoing capital management program, slightly reduces the total share count and aims to enhance earnings per share. While Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates IHG as "Neutral" due to strong operating recovery offset by balance-sheet risks and valuation, analysts currently have a "Buy" rating on the stock with a $154.00 price target.

feed.title: Icon Plc (NASDAQ:ICLR) Given Consensus Rating of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Icon Plc (NASDAQ:ICLR) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from seventeen research firms, with an average one-year target price of $148.80. Analyst opinions vary, with recent ratings ranging from a "market perform" from Leerink Partners to a "hold" from Truist Financial, and a cut in price objective by Barclays. The stock opened at $115.18, has a market capitalization of $9.3 billion, and is largely institutionally owned.
